description: Browse and play audiobooks from Audiobookshelf with bidirectional progress sync. Enriches locally-scanned Jellyfin audiobooks with metadata, cover images, and chapter markers from your ABS server.
name: Audiobookshelf
overview: Integrates Jellyfin with a self-hosted Audiobookshelf server. Provides metadata enrichment, cover images, chapter sync, and bidirectional listening progress sync for all mapped users.

versions.changelog: Fix assembly version mismatch: compile against Jellyfin.Controller 10.11.3 (matching server) instead of 10.11.8; forward-compatible with any 10.11.x server via .NET roll-forward.

Jellyfin 10.11.x compatibility: replace IChapterManager (Video-only) with IChapterRepository; fix Jellyfin.Data.Entities removal; fix TaskTriggerInfoType enum; add [Authorize] to controller; config page viewshow/GUID/accessToken fixes.

Bug fixes: config page checkboxes now interactive; Authorization header added to all API calls; camelCase JSON property names corrected; browser no longer treats server URL + token as a login form; XML serialization crash fixed (Dictionary replaced with serializable List).
Initial alpha release. Metadata provider, bidirectional progress sync, chapter sync, and user mapping.
